response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with over 15 years of industry experience, making him vastly overqualified for this entry-level/junior position. While his technical skills in TypeScript, React, and AWS perfectly align with the required stack and nice-to-have qualifications, his seniority level, salary expectations, and career trajectory will severely misalign with the scope and budget of a junior role.
strengths: Exceptional technical expertise matching the required stack, including extensive TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience.
Strong background in clean software architecture, TDD, and CI/CD pipelines.
Possesses multiple nice-to-have qualifications, including LLM integration, AWS services, and Kubernetes.
concerns: Massively overqualified for an entry-level position, having held Staff, Senior, and Founder titles for several years.
Salary expectations will almost certainly exceed the budget for a junior-level role.
High risk of rapid turnover or job dissatisfaction given the entry-level scope and responsibilities.
